mapper.sql: id, user_id, name, goal_profile_image, card_background_image, page_background_image, is_public, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update: UPDATE goal_themes SET name = #{name}, goal_profile_image = #{goalProfileImage}, card_background_image = #{cardBackgroundImage}, page_background_image = #{pageBackgroundImage}, is_public = #{publicTheme}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM goal_themes WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
